title: Burleigh Heads Rockpools
summary: Rockpools and coastal exploring for families near Burleigh Headland.
why_we_like_it: It feels like a small adventure without needing to plan a big day out.
good_to_know: Best at low tide. Bring reef shoes and check conditions.
parent_tip: Pair it with a beach walk and bakery stop.
best_for: Kids who like exploring, shells and shallow water.
what_to_bring: Hat, water, reef shoes, towel, sunscreen.
safety_notes: Watch slippery rocks and surf conditions.

title: South Bank Parklands
summary: A classic Brisbane family spot with water play, lawns and playgrounds. Super fun.
why_we_like_it: There is enough variety for a short visit or a half-day outing.
good_to_know: Can get busy on weekends. Pack swimmers.
parent_tip: Go early and combine water play with a picnic.
best_for: Families wanting an easy city outing.
